name: Phantra
comment: Phantra is a compact, IP65-rated LED beamwash moving head offering a wide zoom range of 3 - 50deg with pixel-mappable LEDs and a dynamic rotating lens effect that can deliver dramatic effects with saturated, vibrant colors. It features seven, independently controlled, 60W RGBW LEDs along with 28 GLODOT RGB backlit LEDs independently mappable to create stunning backlit effects in combination with the primary LEDs. Choose from a wealth of on-board effects macros that can be further intensified by the rotating lens effect for mid-air and surface looks. It offers exceptional uniform output while maintaining a lightweight, compact form factor complemented by precise, ultra-fast pan/tilt movements and a range of control via DMX, ArtNet & RDM.

capabilities.comment: Rotate CW S > F - Rotate CW
Rotate CCW S > F - Rotate CCW
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
